message:
Polish pass: fix 5 dependency bugs, 2 description errors across 29 new beads

Dependency fixes:
- wa-ssm4 (Auto-Tuning): blocks wa-1qz1.9 (ADWIN) → blocks wa-3kxe.5
  (telemetry pipeline — needs metrics, not drift detection)
- wa-3pr0 (Correlation): blocks wa-1qz1.5 (ledger) → related
  (chi-squared works independently; ledger enhances but doesn't block)
- wa-1lc2 (PDU Pipelining): blocks bd-41w (pool) → related
  (pipelining is protocol-level, works on single connection)
- wa-1c2u (Smart Scrollback): add blocks on bd-20fw (needs fork)
- wa-3axa (Custom Allocator): add blocks on bd-20fw (needs fork)

Description fixes:
- wa-ssm4: fix wrong bead refs (wa-1qz1.9→wa-3kxe.5, wa-r7b1→wa-1qz1.6)
- wa-1qz1.10 (Session DNA): add pre-PCA cold start fallback behavior,
  PCA refit interval, and cold-start unit test requirement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
